summary: CRUD, versioning, dirty-workspace gates, and run lifecycle all pass; fails concentrate in error quality: internal 500s on missing --name/--to, misleading push-conflict hint, unguarded delete of referenced skills, silent lowercasing of names, and a silent no-op version bump on empty edit.
Passes on core run/push/pull flows; fails on hidden run-note surface, read-after-write consistency, guarded delete, org naming, and version-pinned fork syntax.
